title: A Rose.
content:
A sepal, petal, and a thorn
    Upon a common summer's morn,
    A flash of dew, a bee or two,
    A breeze
    A caper in the trees, --
    And I'm a rose!
meaning:
"A Rose." is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
